title: HetznerFirewallRules
description: Manages the complete rules set for a Hetzner Cloud Firewall via the set_rules action.

firewallId.description: ID of the Firewall to manage rules for.

rules.description: Array of rules. Rules are limited to 50 entries per Firewall.

direction.description: Traffic direction in which the rule should be applied to.

sourceIps.description: List of permitted IPv4/IPv6 addresses for incoming traffic.

destinationIps.description: List of permitted IPv4/IPv6 addresses for outgoing traffic.

protocol.description: Network protocol to apply the rule for.

port.description: Port or port range to apply the rule for.

FirewallRuleDirection.description: Traffic direction in which the rule should be applied to.

FirewallRuleProtocol.description: Network protocol to apply the rule for.
